overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring the Arc de Triomphe in Paris. The character walks around the historic monument on a sunny day, circling the cobblestone plaza with no other pedestrians or vehicles present. The video shows smooth camera movement typical of modern open-world games with a visible UI overlay at the bottom of the screen.

events.description: character slows and stops walking, then turns to face the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side of the Arc de Triomphe on the cobblestone plaza

entered.detail: large historic stone triumphal arch with sculptural reliefs
cobblestone ground surface of the plaza
green leafy trees lining the edge of the plaza
classic Parisian architecture visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the cobblestone plaza with the Arc de Triomphe dominating the left side of the frame. The scene is set on a bright sunny day with clear skies, green trees visible to the right, and classic Parisian buildings in the distant background. The character stops and turns toward the camera as the segment ends.

events.description: character resumes walking and begins circling around the monument
moves from alongside the monument into the open plaza area on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: walking around the Arc de Triomphe, moving from the side toward the rear open plaza

entered.detail: tree line visible in the distance across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the monument, causing the Arc de Triomphe to move from the left to the right side of the frame before disappearing behind. The environment opens up into a spacious cobblestone plaza with distant tree lines and Parisian buildings now visible on the left. The character continues walking away from the monument into the open area.

events.description: Arc de Triomphe comes back into view as character approaches from the opposite side
character slows while approaching the base of the monument

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza and approaching the Arc de Triomphe from the front, moving toward its base

entered.detail: large historic stone triumphal arch approaching from the right side
low stone wall at the base of the Arc de Triomphe
intricate stone carvings and sculptures on the monument pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open cobblestone plaza with the Arc de Triomphe initially out of view, then reappearing on the right as the character approaches. The camera moves steadily toward the monument, revealing detailed stone sculptures and the base wall. The segment ends with the character standing near the base of the historic arch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Parisian plaza as a character circles and eventually approaches the Arc de Triomphe. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path with the monument dominating the left side of the frame against a backdrop of clear skies and distant buildings. As the character turns and circles the structure, the arch shifts from the left to the right before disappearing behind them, opening the view to a spacious plaza with tree lines and architecture now visible on the left. The scene then expands as the character walks further into the open area, before the monument gradually reappears on the right. Finally, the camera moves steadily forward to reveal the detailed stone sculptures and base wall as the character comes to a stop at the foot of the historic arch.
